narrative:
Strongsville City has 33,161 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.7% D−R vs -6.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
